error_signature: your query was not provided in the message
title: AI agent not recognizing user query
symptom: The AI agent responds with 'your query was not provided in the message' when trying to create a task, indicating it cannot parse the input correctly.
applies_when: User provides a task creation request
not_this_if: The agent is functioning correctly with other prompts
root_cause: The AI agent is unable to interpret the user input due to the prompt being set to 'Fixed' instead of 'Expression'. This prevents it from dynamically processing the input message as intended.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the AI agent's prompt
Change the prompt type from 'Fixed' to 'Expression'
Test the AI agent with a task creation request again
agent_instruction: Change the prompt type to 'Expression' and save the settings.
